title: Copper Tools
description: This mod adds simple copper tools
body:
# Copper Tools This mod makes **copper much less useless** by adding these tools: - Copper sword - Copper axe - Copper pickaxe - Copper shovel - Copper hoe - Copper shears ![Copper tools](https://cdn.modrinth.com/data/cached_images/1be52ea30f850315eda031ffd105226a59b24ae7.png) --- **_Copper tools are a bit less resistant than iron tools but more than stone tools.
The attack speed is a bit slower than iron but the damage is higher.
Using a copper pickaxe you can mine ores as of an iron pickaxe.
_** --- **Versions:
1.20 to 1.20.6**
